1. **Washington**: Washington is located in the northwest part of the United States. It has a western coastline along the Pacific Ocean.
2. **Oregon**: Oregon is situated to the southeast of Washington and also has a coastline along the Pacific Ocean.
3. **California**: California is in the southwest corner of the west coast. It shares a coastline along the Pacific Ocean and extends westward.

Among these, California extends the farthest west.
